title: Zillow Group Reports First-Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Zillow Group Q1 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Results: Revenue Performance: Total Q1 revenue: $529 million, up 13% year-over-year. Residential revenue: $393 million (up 9% YoY). Rentals revenue: $97 million (up 31% YoY). Mortgages revenue: $31 million (up 19% YoY). Profitability Metrics: Net loss: $23 million (4% of revenue). Adjusted EBITDA: $125 million (24% of revenue), exceeding guidance by $25 million. Gross profit: $406 million (77% margin). Notable Achievements: CEO Rich Barton stated: "Zillow's strong revenue numbers across the business helped us once again meaningfully outperform the residential real estate industry." Business Highlights: Purchase loan originations jumped over 130% to $601 million. Multifamily rental revenue grew 46% year-over-year. Cash and investments reached $2.9 billion. Mobile traffic: 217 million average monthly unique users; 2.3 billion visits (up 3% YoY). Performance vs. Guidance: The company exceeded its outlook on both revenue (by $26 million) and Adjusted EBITDA metrics, demonstrating operational momentum across its diversified platform segments.
